name: whatsapp-sticker-bot
description: Bot WhatsApp stiker dengan fitur .s, .stiker nama|author, dan .help

scripts.start: apt-get update && apt-get install -y libglib2.0-0 libnss3 libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libcups2 libdrm2 libxkbcommon0 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxrandr2 libgbm1 libasound2 libpangocairo-1.0-0 libx11-xcb1 libxshmfence1 libgtk-3-0 && node index.js
